arts.ttl: Amorim gives up on €74m Man Utd flop as BIZARRE transfer link emerges
arts.sum: Given that Man Utd need to raise funds in the summer, there have been suggestions that they could look to offload Hojlund and he has now become the subject of a bizarre transfer link. Injury problems and a dreadful run of form recently led to him losing his place in Ruben Amorim's side, with the Portuguese head coach electing to play Kobbie Mainoo over his misfiring strikers.

arts.ttl: Tottenham fans call for Daniel Levy exit at protest ahead of Man Utd clash
arts.sum: Frustration amongst Spurs supporters towards chairman Levy has grown during a difficult winter period.

arts.ttl: How to watch Tottenham vs Man Utd - TV channel, live stream details, kick off time - football.london
arts.sum: Tottenham and Manchester United find themselves at the bottom end of the Premier League table as they face each other this afternoon. Yes, the match will be broadcast live on the Sky Sports Main Event and Premier League channels with coverage starting at 4pm.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs. Man United: Which 12 senior players are the Red Devils missing in North London?
